query:
ALTER TABLE clientes
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tipoPessoa ENUM('PF', 'PJ') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PJ',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS segmento VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS inscricaoEstadual VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS inscricaoMunicipal VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailNfe VARCHAR(320) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS celular VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS nomeContato VARCHAR(150) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cep VARCHAR(10) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS logradouro VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS numero VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS complemento VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS bairro VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS agencia VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS conta VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tipoConta ENUM('corrente', 'poupanca', 'pagamento') NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3uWnMYqJSMV9zcU.root --database eCW2qMCc4P3oBzxQMhj7Zi --execute

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tipoPessoa ENUM('PF', 'PJ') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PJ',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS segmento VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS inscricaoEstadual VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS inscricaoMunicipal VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailNfe VARCHAR(320) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS celular VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS nomeContato VARCHAR(150) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cep VARCHAR(10) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS logradouro VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS numero VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS complemento VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS bairro VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS agencia VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS conta VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tipoConta ENUM('corrente', 'poupanca', 'pagamento') NULL;
